heading: Definition
label: 30902 Definition
text: In this chapter, the term “federally-owned corporation” means a corporation in which the United States owns all the outstanding capital stock.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090246 App.:741 (11th–26th words).(11th–26th words), .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 141 Stat. 525The term “federally-owned corporation” is defined in this section and used in this chapter to avoid repeating the substance of the definition in several sections in this chapter. The words “or its representatives” are omitted as unnecessary.
